title: hepetis sprucei
intro: Hepetis sprucei, also known as Mexican devil, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, native to Mexico and Central America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include the presence of a toxic alkaloid called scillaren, that has been traditionally used to treat a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Hepetis sprucei include its potential to act as an anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial agent, making it useful in treating conditions such as wounds, infections, and fever. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be used in the form of tinctures or ointments, although caution is advised due to its toxic properties.
